recommendations.title: Un Natale per due
recommendations.overview: An Italian style remake of "Due Date".

recommendations.title: 7 and 8
recommendations.overview: 6th January 1975, in an infant nursery in Palermo (Italy), for a mysterious reason, a male nurse exchanges the labels of baby number 7 and 8. Thirty-one years later Tommaso (7) and Daniele (8) meet each other by accident.
recommendations.director: Salvatore Ficarra, Valentino Picone, Giambattista Avellino

recommendations.title: La matassa
recommendations.overview: Two cousins haven't spoken for almost twenty years, thanks to the enmity that their fathers feel toward one another. But an accident suddenly brings the cousins back together and thrusts them deep into the heart of the mafia.
recommendations.director: Salvatore Ficarra, Valentino Picone, Giambattista Avellino

recommendations.title: First Blood
recommendations.overview: When former Green Beret John Rambo is harassed by local law enforcement and arrested for vagrancy, he is forced to flee into the mountains and wage an escalating one-man war against his pursuers.

recommendations.title: Anthony Jeselnik: Thoughts and Prayers
recommendations.overview: There's no subject too dark as the comedian skewers taboos and riffs on national tragedies before pulling back the curtain on his provocative style.

recommendations.title: Be Sick… It's Free
recommendations.overview: Comedy about the flawed Italian healthcare system of the time and a doctor's expeirence with it.

recommendations.title: Close
recommendations.overview: Two 13-year-old boys spend an idyllic summer together, but their connection is put to the test when they become the subject of speculation at school.

recommendations.title: The Great War
recommendations.overview: Italy, 1916. Oreste Jacovacci and Giovanni Busacca are called, as all the Italian youths, to serve the army in the WWI. They both try in every way to avoid serving the army.

recommendations.title: Balkan Line
recommendations.overview: After the NATO bombing of Yugoslavia in 1999, the Yugoslav army pulls out of Kosovo region, leaving Serbian people at the mercy of the Albanian UCK. A small band of soldiers must take over the Slatina airport, and hold it until the Russian peacekeepe

recommendations.title: The Patience Stone
recommendations.overview: In a war-ridden country, a woman watches over her husband, comatose from a bullet in the neck and abandoned by Jihad companions and brothers. One day, the woman decides to say things to him she could never have done before.
